creator: deischen@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 25 May 2013, Matthias Apitz wrote:

>
> Concerning Please rebuild "devel/imake" with ucpp, how this must be done
> exactly? In devel/imake/Makefile it seems to set 'ucpp' already, but the
> resulting imake still uses cpp; Please advise, thanks

Yes, and devel/imake should DTRT if it requires ucpp, meaning
ucpp (or whatever) should be a dependency somehow.

-- 
DE
